chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

parts.text: وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : أيما مؤمن سأله أخوه المؤمن حاجته وهو يقدر على قضائها فرده منها سلط الله عليه شجاعا 7 في قبره ينهش من أصابعه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 119. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: If any believer asks his fellow brother to help him and he refuses while he is able to do, Allah will impose on him a serpent in his grave to bite his fingers.
